name: 11 · HTTP Call
description: Tiny demo of the HTTP executor backend with borrowed references. A HumanTask collects {username, topic}; an AutomatedStep with backendType=http builds a POST whose URL path, query param, header, and JSON body all interpolate `{{ intake.* }}` through the shared Tera context (the same borrow machinery SMTP/LLM/Python use). `output_mapping` then pulls fields back out of the echoed response. Pair with `just dev httpbin-up` to run a local echo server at http://localhost:13110 — no internet needed; the call hits `/anything/{{ intake.username }}`, the echo returns 200, and the net completes. Needs no workspace resource.
